## `User` Data Model

Defined as a Scala `case class` in `webapp/src/UsersController.scala`:

```scala
case class User(id: Int, name: String, email: String, createdAt: LocalDateTime)
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | `Int` | A unique numeric identifier for the user |
| `name` | `String` | The user's display name |
| `email` | `String` | The user's email address |
| `createdAt` | `java.time.LocalDateTime` | The timestamp when the user was created |
